About Me

Hey, there! I am Nikita Saxena
I am in my senior year at BITS Pilani, where I am pursuing a dual major in Physics and Computer Science. I’d be graduating in 2023. I’m interested in deep learning for generative processes, causality and consciousness. I’m currently a research intern in Yoshua Bengio’s group at MILA where I am working on this super exciting idea of Generative Flow Networks!
I’m an outgoing introvert. I am a huge foodie and love trying different cuisines. In my free time, I like to scroll through my Twitter feed and sleep!
Oh and my birthday is on September 2 and I love surprise gifts! xD
Now that you know a bit about me I would love to know more about you. So drop me an email, and let’s connect!

Education

BITS Pilani, Pilani Campus

2018 — Present

I'm enrolled in an integrated five year programme, pursuing a M. Sc. in Physics and B. E. in Computer Science. I've completed core physics electives including (but not limited to) Quantum Mechanics, Nuclear Physics, Computational Physics and Statistical Mechanics. In Computer Science, I have completed Discrete Mathematics for Computer Science, Object Oriented Programming, Database Management Software and Data Structures & Algorithms.

Delhi Public School, Greater Noida

2008 — 2018

My school was affilated to Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE). I graduated from school with 98%, and was appointed the Head Girl for the academic year 2017-18.
